calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jim W. Yu, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Juan Perez and Rosalinda Cortez, who were placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Daniel Silva.
Default entered against defendant on September 12, 2007.
Doe defendants dismissed on August 5, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Juan Perez and Rosalinda Cortez, and against the Defaulted Defendant Daniel Silva as follows:

Damages/Principal as to Plaintiff Juan Perez - $152,272.20.
Damages/Principal as to Plaintiff Rosalinda Cortez - $35,000.00.

Total Damages - $187,272.20.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
